Operation 'UploadFile' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on expected inputs (file format constraints, size limits), return value (what File object contains), and how the uploaded file integrates with the broader API workflow. Added context about file ID assignment, return structure, integration with QR code operations, and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Users can upload image files (e.g., PNG, JPEG) to the server using a POST request to this endpoint. These uploaded files are stored securely on the server for future use.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload custom image file for QR code integration
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a custom image file (PNG, JPEG, etc.) to be used in QR code generation. The file is stored securely on the server and assigned a unique file identifier. Returns a File object containing the file ID, name, URL, and metadata. Uploaded files can be referenced in subsequent QR code creation requests. Requires Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on expected inputs (file format constraints, size limits), return value (what File object contains), and how the uploaded file integrates with the broader API workflow. Added context about file ID assignment, return structure, integration with QR code operations, and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GetFiles' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original summary is too generic ('Get files list'). Description is unclear about what 'presetted' means, lacks pagination context, and doesn't specify return structure. Added clarity on file types (custom vs preset), pagination support, return object structure, and authentication requirement. Improved terminology consistency with API domain (File objects, pagination).

data.current_description: Users can retrieve their uploaded files or public presetted as needed through this endpoint using unique file identifiers.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve list of uploaded and preset files
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all uploaded custom files and public preset files available to the authenticated user. Returns an array of File objects containing file ID, name, URL, type, and creation metadata. Supports filtering and pagination parameters to manage large file collections. Requires Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic ('Get files list'). Description is unclear about what 'presetted' means, lacks pagination context, and doesn't specify return structure. Added clarity on file types (custom vs preset), pagination support, return object structure, and authentication requirement. Improved terminology consistency with API domain (File objects, pagination).

message: Operation 'UpdateFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specificity about what folder properties can be updated, what the operation returns, and clarification about authorization scope. Added details about updateable fields, return value, and access control for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update a folder for the authorized user by folder ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing folder for the authenticated user identified by folder_id. Accepts folder properties such as name and description. Returns the updated folder object. Only the authenticated user can modify their own folders.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what folder properties can be updated, what the operation returns, and clarification about authorization scope. Added details about updateable fields, return value, and access control for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'CreateFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Added context about required inputs (folder name), return value (folder object with ID), and the purpose of folders within the API domain for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create a new folder for the authorized user
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new folder for the authenticated user to organize QR codes. Requires folder name in the request body. Returns the newly created folder object with a unique folder ID. Folders help categorize and manage QR code projects.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about required inputs (folder name), return value (folder object with ID), and the purpose of folders within the API domain for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GetFolders' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks detail about pagination, return structure, and use case context. Added information about pagination support, folder object properties, and practical usage guidance for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get list of folders for logged in user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all folders belonging to the authenticated user. Returns a paginated list of folder objects. Each folder contains metadata including ID, name, and description. Use this to display available folders for QR code organization.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about pagination, return structure, and use case context. Added information about pagination support, folder object properties, and practical usage guidance for AI agents.

message: Operation 'CreateQRCode' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic. Added comprehensive context about supported QR code types (from schema context), customization options, and return value. This enables AI agents to understand the full capability and determine appropriate usage scenarios.

data.current_description: Create a new QR Code for the authorized user.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new QR code for the authenticated user with specified data type and content. Supports multiple QR code types including URL, text, email, phone, SMS, WiFi, vCard, event, and geolocation. Accepts optional customization parameters such as folder assignment and file references. Returns the newly created QR code object with a unique ID and generated QR code image.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Added comprehensive context about supported QR code types (from schema context), customization options, and return value. This enables AI agents to understand the full capability and determine appropriate usage scenarios.

message: Operation 'GetQRCodes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks pagination details and return structure information. Added specifics about pagination support, QR code object properties, and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get list of QR Codes for logged in user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all QR codes belonging to the authenticated user. Returns a paginated list of QR code objects with metadata including ID, type, content, creation date, and associated folder. Use this to display, filter, or manage existing QR codes.
data.reasoning: Description lacks pagination details and return structure information. Added specifics about pagination support, QR code object properties, and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update a QR Code for the authorized user by QR Code ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing QR code for the authenticated user identified by qr_code_id. Allows modification of QR code properties including content, customization settings, and folder assignment. Returns the updated QR code object. Changes take effect immediately and affect all scans of the updated QR code.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about updateable properties and side effects. Added details about what can be modified, return value, and important side effect information (immediate effect on scans) for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Get a QR Code for the authorized user by QR Code ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific QR code for the authenticated user identified by qr_code_id. Returns the complete QR code object including ID, type, content, customization settings, folder assignment, creation date, and generated QR code image data.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about return value structure. Added comprehensive information about what properties are returned in the QR code object to help AI agents understand the response structure and available data.

Operation 'UpdateFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specificity about what folder properties can be updated, what the operation returns, and clarification about authorization scope. Added details about updateable fields, return value, and access control for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update a folder for the authorized user by folder ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing folder for the authenticated user identified by folder_id. Accepts folder properties such as name and description. Returns the updated folder object. Only the authenticated user can modify their own folders.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what folder properties can be updated, what the operation returns, and clarification about authorization scope. Added details about updateable fields, return value, and access control for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'CreateFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Added context about required inputs (folder name), return value (folder object with ID), and the purpose of folders within the API domain for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create a new folder for the authorized user
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new folder for the authenticated user to organize QR codes. Requires folder name in the request body. Returns the newly created folder object with a unique folder ID. Folders help categorize and manage QR code projects.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about required inputs (folder name), return value (folder object with ID), and the purpose of folders within the API domain for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GetFolders' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks detail about pagination, return structure, and use case context. Added information about pagination support, folder object properties, and practical usage guidance for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get list of folders for logged in user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all folders belonging to the authenticated user. Returns a paginated list of folder objects. Each folder contains metadata including ID, name, and description. Use this to display available folders for QR code organization.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about pagination, return structure, and use case context. Added information about pagination support, folder object properties, and practical usage guidance for AI agents.

message: Operation 'CreateQRCode' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic. Added comprehensive context about supported QR code types (from schema context), customization options, and return value. This enables AI agents to understand the full capability and determine appropriate usage scenarios.

data.current_description: Create a new QR Code for the authorized user.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new QR code for the authenticated user with specified data type and content. Supports multiple QR code types including URL, text, email, phone, SMS, WiFi, vCard, event, and geolocation. Accepts optional customization parameters such as folder assignment and file references. Returns the newly created QR code object with a unique ID and generated QR code image.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Added comprehensive context about supported QR code types (from schema context), customization options, and return value. This enables AI agents to understand the full capability and determine appropriate usage scenarios.

Added specifics about pagination support, QR code object properties, and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get list of QR Codes for logged in user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all QR codes belonging to the authenticated user. Returns a paginated list of QR code objects with metadata including ID, type, content, creation date, and associated folder. Use this to display, filter, or manage existing QR codes.
data.reasoning: Description lacks pagination details and return structure information. Added specifics about pagination support, QR code object properties, and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update a QR Code for the authorized user by QR Code ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing QR code for the authenticated user identified by qr_code_id. Allows modification of QR code properties including content data, customization settings, and folder assignment. Returns the updated QR code object. Changes take effect immediately and affect all scans of the updated QR code.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about updateable properties and side effects. Added details about what can be modified, return value, and clarification that updates affect existing QR code behavior for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific QR code for the authenticated user identified by qr_code_id. Returns the complete QR code object including ID, type, content data, customization settings, creation metadata, and associated folder information.

message: Operation 'UploadFile' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on expected inputs (file format constraints, size limits), return value (what File object contains), and how the uploaded file integrates with the broader API workflow. Added context about file ID assignment, return structure, integration with QR code operations, and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Users can upload image files (e.g., PNG, JPEG) to the server using a POST request to this endpoint. These uploaded files are stored securely on the server for future use.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload custom image file for QR code integration
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a custom image file (PNG, JPEG, etc.) to be used in QR code generation. The file is stored securely on the server and assigned a unique file identifier. Returns a File object containing the file ID, name, URL, and metadata. Uploaded files can be referenced in subsequent QR code creation requests. Requires Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on expected inputs (file format constraints, size limits), return value (what File object contains), and how the uploaded file integrates with the broader API workflow. Added context about file ID assignment, return structure, integration with QR code operations, and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GetFiles' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original summary is too generic ('Get files list'). Description is unclear about what 'presetted' means, lacks pagination context, and doesn't specify return structure. Added clarity on file types (custom vs preset), pagination support, return object structure, and authentication requirement. Improved terminology consistency with API domain (File objects, pagination).

data.current_description: Users can retrieve their uploaded files or public presetted as needed through this endpoint using unique file identifiers.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve list of uploaded and preset files
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all uploaded custom files and public preset files available to the authenticated user. Returns an array of File objects containing file ID, name, URL, type, and creation metadata. Supports filtering and pagination parameters to manage large file collections. Requires Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic ('Get files list'). Description is unclear about what 'presetted' means, lacks pagination context, and doesn't specify return structure. Added clarity on file types (custom vs preset), pagination support, return object structure, and authentication requirement. Improved terminology consistency with API domain (File objects, pagination).
